name: @sky-movie/desktop-app
description: Local-first desktop movie and TV library manager.

scripts.build: npm run prepare:libmpv && npm run build:native && tsc --noEmit && electron-vite build
scripts.package: npm run prepare:libmpv && npm run build:native && electron-builder
scripts.package:all: npm run prepare:libmpv && npm run build:native && electron-builder --win --mac --linux
scripts.package:current: npm run prepare:libmpv && npm run build:native && electron-builder
scripts.package:linux: npm run prepare:libmpv && npm run build:native && electron-builder --linux
scripts.package:mac: npm run prepare:libmpv && npm run build:native && electron-builder --mac
scripts.package:win: npm run prepare:libmpv && npm run build:native && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ..\scripts\build-windows-app.ps1
scripts.package:win:builder: npm run prepare:libmpv && npm run build:native && electron-builder --win nsis dir
scripts.package:win:dir: npm run prepare:libmpv && npm run build:native && electron-builder --win dir
scripts.package:win:installer: npm run prepare:libmpv && npm run build:native && electron-builder --win nsis
scripts.rebuild:native: cd native/mpv-player && npm install && electron-rebuild -f -m . && node ../../../scripts/copy-native.mjs

author: Sky Movie
